title: idm:client bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
bind-dyndb-ldap
[11.6-6]
- Fix rpminspect warnings
  Resolves: RHEL-22497

[11.6-5]
- Rebuild due to Bind ABI changes.
  Resolves: RHEL-28842

[11.6-4]
- Modify empty zone conflicts under exclusive mode
  Resolves: rhbz#2126877

[11.6-3]
- Rebuild against bind 9.11.36
- Resolves: rhbz#2022762

[11.6-2]
- Rebuild against bind 9.11.26
- Resolves: rhbz#1904612

[11.6-1]
- New upstream release
- Resolves: rhbz#1891735

[11.3-1]
- New upstream release
- Resolves: rhbz#1845211

[11.2-4]
- Rebuild against bind 9.11.18
  Resolves: rhbz#1834264

[11.2-3]
- Rebuild against bind 9.11.13
  Related: RHBZ#1762813

[11.2-2]
- Add support for serve-stale, detected on build time
  Patch by Petr Mensik <pemensik@redhat.com>
  Related: RHBZ#1762813

custodia
[0.6.0-3]
- Require platform-python-setuptools instead of python3-setuptools
- Resolves: rhbz#1650508

[0.6.0-2]
- Don't turn deprecation warnings into fatal errors

[0.6.0-1]
- New upstream release Custodia 0.6.0
- Run all tests again
- Remove etcd support and python3-custodia-extra
- Remove unnecesary conflict with old FreeIPA

[0.5.0-12]
- Remove the Python 2 subpackage
- Skip a test that fails on a different logging/error message
- In %check, use pytest directly rather than tox

[0.5.0-11]
- Escape macros in %changelog

[0.5.0-10]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_28_Mass_Rebuild

[0.5.0-9]
- freeipa 4.4.4-2.fc26 and newer are compatible with custodia 0.5
- Fix dependency to python2-jwcrypto >= 0.4.2

[0.5.0-8]
- Add PIP_IGNORE_INSTALLED

[0.5.0-7]
- Modernize spec

[0.5.0-6]
- Require latest python-jwcrypto with Python 3 fix
- Use python2 prefix for all Python 2 dependencies

ipa
[4.9.13-21.0.1]
- Set IPAPLATFORM=rhel when build on Oracle Linux [Orabug: 29516674]

[4.9.13-21]
- Fix memory leaks in IPA plugins
  Resolves: RHEL-145410

[4.9.13-20]
- Refactor ipatests for unique krbcanonicalname
  Resolves: RHEL-110061

[4.9.13-19]
- Enforce uniqueness across krbprincipalname and krbcanonicalname
  ipa-kdb: enforce PAC presence on TGT for TGS-REQ
  ipatests: extend test for unique krbcanonicalname
  Resolves: RHEL-110061

[4.9.13-18]
- Set krbCanonicalName admin@REALM on the admin user
  Resolves: RHEL-89895

[4.9.13-17]
- kdb: keeep ipadb_get_connection() from succeding with null LDAP context
  Resolves: RHEL-58453

[4.9.13-16]
- Add a- heck into ipa-cert-fix tool to avoid updating certs if CA is close to expire
  Resolves: RHEL-4941
- Fix rpminspect's 'patches' warnings
  Resolves: RHEL-22497

[4.9.13-15]
- Replica CA installation: ignore skew during initial replication
  Resolves RHEL-80995

[4.9.13-14]
- ipatests: Update ipa-adtrust-install test
  Resolves: RHEL-40894

[4.9.13-13]
- Add ipa-idrange-fix
  Resolves: RHEL-56920
- Unconditionally add MS-PAC to global config on update
  Resolves: RHEL-49437
- ipatests: Update ipa-adtrust-install test
  Resolves: RHEL-40894
- Require python-qrcode version 5.3 or later
  Related: RHEL-15090

ipa-healthcheck
[0.12-6]
- Don't rely on order in trust roles (RHEL-99487)

[0.12-5]
- Pull in lint fixes. Prevents exception when testing for AD trust (RHEL-79081)
- Add direct requires on python3-libsss_nss_idmap.

[0.12-4]
- Change log file permissions of IPA as per CIS benchmark (RHEL-38929)

[0.12-3]
- Error in DogtagCertsConnectivityCheckCA with external CA (#2223942)

[0.12-2]
- Skip AD domains with posix ranges in the catalog check (#1775199)

[0.12-1]
- Update to upstream 0.12 (#2139529)
- Verify that the number of krb5kdc worker processes is aligned to the
  number of configured CPUs (#2052930)
- IPADNSSystemRecordsCheck displays warning message for 2 expected
  ipa-ca AAAA records (#2099484)

[0.7-14]
- Add CLI options to healthcheck configuration file (#1872467)

[0.7-13]
- Allow multiple file modes in the FileChecker (#2058239)

[0.7-12]
- Use the subject base from the IPA configuration, not REALM (#2066308)

[0.7-11]
- Add support for the DNS URI type (#2037847)

opendnssec
[2.1.7-2]
- Don't creat /var/run/opendnssec directory
- Resolves: RHEL-12163

[2.1.7-1]
- Upstream release 2.1.7
- Resolves: rhbz#1904484

[2.1.6-2]
- Resolves: rhbz#1831732 AVC avc: denied { dac_override } for comm='ods-enforcerd

[2.1.6-1]
- Resolves: rhbz#1759888 Rebase OpenDNSSEC to 2.1

[1.4.14-1]
- Update to 1.4.14 as first steop to migrating to 2.x
- Resolves: rhbz#1413254 Move tmpfiles.d config to %{_tmpfilesdir}, install LICENSE as %license

[1.4.9-7]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_27_Binutils_Mass_Rebuild

[1.4.9-6]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_27_Mass_Rebuild

[1.4.9-5]
- Fix FTBFS (#1424019) in order to rebuild against new ldns

[1.4.9-4]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_26_Mass_Rebuild

[1.4.9-3]
- Resolves: rbz#1303965 upgrade to opendnssec-1.4.9-1.fc23 breaks old installations
- On initial install, after token init, also run ods-ksmutil setup

python-jwcrypto
[0.5.0-2]
- Address potential DoS with high compression ratio
  Resolves: RHEL-28697
- Limit number of iterations for PBES
  Resolves: RHEL-23036 RHEL-23037

[0.5.0-1.1]
- Bump dist to solve version sorting issue, fixes RHBZ#2097800

[0.5.0-1]
- New upstream release 0.5.0
- Fixes Coverity scan issue

[0.4.2-5]
- Drop Python 2 subpackages from RHEL 8, fixes RHBZ#1567152

[0.4.2-4]
- Build Python 3 package on RHEL > 7, fixes RHBZ#1516813

[0.4.2-3]
- Run tests with bytes warning

[0.4.2-2]
- Modernize spec

[0.4.2-1]
- Upstream release 0.4.2
- Resolves: RHBZ #1476150

[0.4.1-1]
- Upstream release 0.4.1

[0.3.2-3]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_26_Mass_Rebuild

python-kdcproxy
[0.4-5.2]
- Use DNS discovery for declared realms only (CVE-2025-59088)
  Resolves: RHEL-113657
- Fix DoS vulnerability based on unbounded TCP buffering (CVE-2025-59089)
  Resolves: RHEL-113664

[0.4-5.1]
- Log KDC timeout only once per request
  Resolves: RHEL-68634

[0.4-5]
- Always buffer TCP data in __handle_recv()
- Resolves: #1747144

[0.4-4]
- Correct addrs sorting to be by TCP/UDP
- Resolves: #1732898

[0.4-3]
- Bump release to be able to add python-kdcpoxy to the idm module
  Resolves: RHBZ#1639332

[0.4-2]
- Update dependencies in test suite

[0.4-1]
- New upstream release - 0.4
- Port to autosetup

[0.3.2-14]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_29_Mass_Rebuild

[0.3.2-13]
- Rebuilt for Python 3.7

[0.3.2-12]
- Update conditionals.
- Make preperations for non-python2 builds

python-qrcode
[5.3-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-15090 Generation of image file fails with Python 3

[5.1-12]
- Require platform-python-setuptools instead of python3-setuptools
- Resolves: rhbz#1654457, rhbz#1654458

[5.1-11]
- Conditionalize the python2 subpackage

[5.1-10]
- Also rename python-qrcode-core to python2-qrcode-core

[5.1-9]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_28_Mass_Rebuild

[5.1-8]
- Python 2 binary package renamed to python2-qrcode
  See https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/FinalizingFedoraSwitchtoPython3

[5.1-7]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_27_Mass_Rebuild

[5.1-6]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_26_Mass_Rebuild

[5.1-5]
- Rebuild for Python 3.6

[5.1-4]
- https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Changes/Automatic_Provides_for_Python_RPM_Packages

python-yubico
[1.3.2-9.1]
- Rebuilt to fix NVR issue (#2097803)

[1.3.2-9]
- Conditionalize the python2 subpackage

[1.3.2-8]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_28_Mass_Rebuild

[1.3.2-7]
- Backport an upstream python3 fix (#1484862)

[1.3.2-6]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_27_Mass_Rebuild

[1.3.2-5]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_26_Mass_Rebuild

[1.3.2-4]
- Rebuild for Python 3.6

[1.3.2-3]
- https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Changes/Automatic_Provides_for_Python_RPM_Packages

[1.3.2-2]
- Add missing provide for python-yubico
- Add missing obsoletes for python-yubico

[1.3.2-1]
- Cleanup obsolete conditions (like RHEL 6)
- Update to v1.3.2

pyusb
[1.0.0-9.1]
- Rebuilt to fix the NVR issue (#2094880)

[1.0.0-9]
- Conditionalize the python2 subpackage

[1.0.0-8]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_28_Mass_Rebuild

[1.0.0-7]
- Cleanup packaging and fix archful provide in noarch package

[1.0.0-6]
- Python 2 binary package renamed to python2-pyusb
  See https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/FinalizingFedoraSwitchtoPython3

[1.0.0-5]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_27_Mass_Rebuild

[1.0.0-4]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_26_Mass_Rebuild

[1.0.0-3]
- Rebuild for Python 3.6

[1.0.0-2]
- https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Changes/Automatic_Provides_for_Python_RPM_Packages

[1.0.0-1]
- Latest upstream, BZ 1192561.

slapi-nis
[0.60.0-4]
- Ignore updates from non-tracked subtrees during modify/modrdn/update
  to avoid deadlocks with retro changelog
- Resolves: RHEL-5134

[0.60.0-3]
- Also handle base searches within the compat tree
- Related: rhbz#2183469

[0.60.0-2]
- Fix base DN searches outside the compat tree
- Resolves: rhbz#2183469

[0.60.0-1]
- upstream release 0.60.0
- Change license from GPLv2 to GPLv3+ to follow 389-ds licensing
- Resolves: rhbz#1984010
  Fix ID views integration
- Fix base scope lookups
- Resolves: rhbz#1784172
  Bump NIS max dgram size to 8KB by default instead of 1KB
- Resolves: rhbz#2070575
  Allow to rebuild the compat tree

[0.56.6-4]
- Resolves: rhbz#2000919 - memory leak in backend_search_cb

[0.56.6-3]
- Resolves: rhbz#1958909 - fix regression for scoped searches in compat tree
- Resolves: rhbz#1978189 - better handle error response from libsss_nss_idmap

[0.56.6-2]
- CVE 2021-3480:  idm:DL1/slapi-nis: NULL dereference (DoS) with specially crafted Binding DN
- Resolves: rhbz#1944713

[0.56.6-1]
- Upstream release 0.56.6
- Resolves rhbz#1891741

[0.56.5-4]
- Ignore unmatched searches
- Resolves: rhbz#1874015

[0.56.5-3]
- Fix memory leaks in ID views processing
- Resolves: rhbz#1875348

softhsm
[2.6.0-5]
- Install prever devel package requirements for new negative option patch
  Related: RHBZ#1857272

[2.6.0-4]
- Fixes: rhbz#1857272 - negative option for token.mechanism not working correctly

[2.6.0-3]
- Fixes: rhbz#1834909 - softhsm use-after-free on process exit
- Synchronize the final fix with Fedora

[2.6.0-2]
- Fixes: rhbz#1834909 - softhsm use-after-free on process exit

[2.6.0-1]
- Fixes: rhbz#1818877 - rebase to softhsm 2.6.0+
- Fixes: rhbz#1701233 - support setting supported signature methods on the token

[2.4.0-4]
- Provide specific version libsofthsm2.so for p11-kit
- Fixes: rhbz#1727065

[2.4.0-3]
- Remove architecture-specific path from softhsm2.module definition
- Fixes: rhbz#1727065

[2.4.0-2]
- Replace PKCS11 headers by a more liberal version from p11-kit
- Fixes: rhbz#1615766

[2.4.0-1]
- Updated to latest upstream release

[2.3.0-4]
- Fix crash when used as a PKCS11 library via p11-kit (#1608690)

slapi-nis
[0.60.0-4]
- Ignore updates from non-tracked subtrees during modify/modrdn/update
  to avoid deadlocks with retro changelog
- Resolves: RHEL-5134

[0.60.0-3]
- Also handle base searches within the compat tree
- Related: rhbz#2183469

[0.60.0-2]
- Fix base DN searches outside the compat tree
- Resolves: rhbz#2183469

[0.60.0-1]
- upstream release 0.60.0
- Change license from GPLv2 to GPLv3+ to follow 389-ds licensing
- Resolves: rhbz#1984010
  Fix ID views integration
- Fix base scope lookups
- Resolves: rhbz#1784172
  Bump NIS max dgram size to 8KB by default instead of 1KB
- Resolves: rhbz#2070575
  Allow to rebuild the compat tree

[0.56.6-4]
- Resolves: rhbz#2000919 - memory leak in backend_search_cb

[0.56.6-3]
- Resolves: rhbz#1958909 - fix regression for scoped searches in compat tree
- Resolves: rhbz#1978189 - better handle error response from libsss_nss_idmap

[0.56.6-2]
- CVE 2021-3480:  idm:DL1/slapi-nis: NULL dereference (DoS) with specially crafted Binding DN
- Resolves: rhbz#1944713

[0.56.6-1]
- Upstream release 0.56.6
- Resolves rhbz#1891741

[0.56.5-4]
- Ignore unmatched searches
- Resolves: rhbz#1874015

[0.56.5-3]
- Fix memory leaks in ID views processing
- Resolves: rhbz#1875348

softhsm
[2.6.0-5]
- Install prever devel package requirements for new negative option patch
  Related: RHBZ#1857272

[2.6.0-4]
- Fixes: rhbz#1857272 - negative option for token.mechanism not working correctly

[2.6.0-3]
- Fixes: rhbz#1834909 - softhsm use-after-free on process exit
- Synchronize the final fix with Fedora

[2.6.0-2]
- Fixes: rhbz#1834909 - softhsm use-after-free on process exit

[2.6.0-1]
- Fixes: rhbz#1818877 - rebase to softhsm 2.6.0+
- Fixes: rhbz#1701233 - support setting supported signature methods on the token

[2.4.0-4]
- Provide specific version libsofthsm2.so for p11-kit
- Fixes: rhbz#1727065

[2.4.0-3]
- Remove architecture-specific path from softhsm2.module definition
- Fixes: rhbz#1727065

[2.4.0-2]
- Replace PKCS11 headers by a more liberal version from p11-kit
- Fixes: rhbz#1615766

[2.4.0-1]
- Updated to latest upstream release
